      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">COVERAGE VALIDATION - UNITED STATES</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1619-1865 -&gt; no capital</li><li>1874 -&gt; savings erased</li><li>1930s-1968 -&gt; credit denied</li><li>1900s-Today -&gt; debt reliance</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA WITNESS - GLOBAL FULFILLMENT</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Haiti forced to borrow to pay France reparations</td><td>1825-1947</td><td>Haiti</td><td>He lends - you borrow. He is head - you are tail.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>IMF and World Bank loan dependency</td><td>1980s-Today</td><td>Jamaica, Nigeria, Ghana, Guyana</td><td>Forced borrowing - no capital base.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Colonial credit systems deny Black borrowers</td><td>1800s-1960s</td><td>All British/French colonies</td><td>Cannot lend - forced to borrow.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Caribbean nations borrow for hurricane recovery</td><td>1980s-Today</td><td>Bahamas, Jamaica, Barbados</td><td>He lends - you remain tail.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Micro-loan dependency cycles in West Africa</td><td>2000s-Today</td><td>Nigeria, Sierra Leone, Ghana</td><td>Borrow continuously - no capital to lend.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA COVERAGE VALIDATION</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1825-1947 -&gt; Haiti forced reparation debt</li><li>1800s-1960s -&gt; colonial credit denial</li><li>1980s-Today-&gt; Jamaica/Nigeria/Ghana IMF dependency</li><li>1980s-Today-&gt; Caribbean hurricane debt cycle</li><li>2000s-Today-&gt; West African micro-loan dependency</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection nations-section"><div class="subsec-title">NATIONS OF THE CONSPIRACY - ZAMAYAR(Psalms) 83 ACTORS</div><p class="nations-note">France</p><p class="nations-note">The financial captivity of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) - borrowing but never lending, the tail and never the head - has been engineered by specific actors.</p><p class="nations-note">The French government demanded 150 million francs from Haiti in 1825 as the price of diplomatic recognition - forcing the only successful slave revolution in history to borrow money to pay its former enslavers, a debt that took 122 years to clear and ensured Haiti would be the tail for generations.</p><p class="nations-note">International Monetary Fund / World Bank</p><p class="nations-note">The International Monetary Fund and World Bank - institutions controlled by the United States, United Kingdom, France, Germany, and Japan - have maintained Jamaica, Nigeria, Ghana, Guyana, and Haiti in cycles of debt dependency through Structural Adjustment Programs that extracted economic sovereignty in exchange for loans.</p><p class="nations-note">Britain</p><p class="nations-note">The British banking system through redlining equivalents denied credit to Black communities in the United Kingdom and across the colonies.</p><p class="nations-note">United States</p><p class="nations-note">The United States banking system through documented redlining from the 1930s through 1968 - and continuing in practice beyond - denied mortgage credit to YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) , preventing the formation of wealth that would enable lending.</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish Merchants and Plantation Owners</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish banking families - including those connected to the financing of colonial enterprises - operated within the broader credit system that maintained YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) in the borrowing position.</p><p class="nations-note">Genoese and Venetian Banking Houses</p><p class="nations-note">The Genoese and Venetian banking houses that financed the first slave voyages established the financial architecture within which YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) has been the tail for 500 years.</p><p class="nations-note">Denmark</p><p class="nations-note">The Danish and Swedish colonial enterprises in the Caribbean operated credit systems that excluded enslaved and freed YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) .</p><p class="nations-note">The head position has been occupied by a specific and identifiable confederacy.</p></div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-card" id="entry-25">
      <div class="entry-header" onclick="toggleEntry(this)">
      <div class="entry-num-title">
      <span class="entry-num">25</span>
      <span class="entry-title">CURSES PURSUE</span>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-ref-toggle">
      <span class="entry-ref">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:45</span>
      <span class="entry-chevron">&#9660;</span>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-body">
      <div class="scripture-block">
      <div class="scripture-label">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:45</div>
      <div class="scripture-text">Moreover all these curses shall come upon you, and shall pursue you, and overtake you, till you be destroyed; because you listened not unto the voice of YAHAWAH(FATHER) your ALAHAYAM(God), to keep his commandments and his statutes which he commanded you.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">WHAT THIS VERSE MEANS - PHRASE BY PHRASE</div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;All these curses shall come upon you and shall pursue you and overtake you&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> The curses do not wait. They actively pursue. When YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) appears to be advancing - Reconstruction, the Harlem Renaissance, the Civil Rights Movement - the curse catches up. Reconstruction ended by white terror. The Harlem Renaissance ended by the Depression. Civil rights gains reversed. The curses pursue and overtake every advance.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;Because you listened not unto the voice of YAHAWAH(FATHER) your ALAHAYAM(God)&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> This is the identified cause. The curses are not random oppression - they are the covenant response to covenant departure. YAHAWAH(FATHER) is named as the agent. The commandments are named as the condition. This is the most important verse for understanding the path out of the 400-year curse.</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">MODERN EXPLANATION</div><p>Conditions repeat and intensify across generations.</p></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">REAL-WORLD EVIDENCE - UNITED STATES (400-YEAR COVERAGE)</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Slavery to post-slavery systems</td><td>1619-1865 -&gt; after</td><td>United States</td><td>Continued condition.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Reconstruction to Jim Crow</td><td>1865-1965</td><td>United States</td><td>Pursuit continues.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Segregation to modern systems</td><td>1965-Today</td><td>United States</td><td>Overtaken.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>400-year recognition</td><td>1619-Today</td><td>United States</td><td>Confirms pursuit.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">COVERAGE VALIDATION - UNITED STATES</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1619-1865 -&gt; slavery</li><li>1865-1965 -&gt; Jim Crow</li><li>1965-Today-&gt; structural inequality</li><li>1619-Today -&gt; 400-year continuity</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA WITNESS - GLOBAL FULFILLMENT</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Slavery abolished - replaced by apprenticeship system</td><td>1834-1838</td><td>Jamaica, Barbados, Trinidad, Guyana</td><td>Curses pursue - condition follows in new form.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Colonial independence followed by neocolonialism</td><td>1960s-Today</td><td>Nigeria, Ghana, Sierra Leone</td><td>Overtaken - condition persists after formal end.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Haiti - revolution to occupation to debt</td><td>1804-Today</td><td>Haiti</td><td>Cursed condition pursues across every era.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Caribbean structural poverty across all generations</td><td>1838-Today</td><td>Jamaica, Guyana, Barbados, Suriname</td><td>Pursue and overtake - no generational break.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Brazilian Afro-descendant poverty across 500 years</td><td>1500s-Today</td><td>Brazil</td><td>Till destroyed - 500-year continuity of the condition.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA COVERAGE VALIDATION</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1500s-Today-&gt; Brazilian Afro-descendant poverty continuity</li><li>1804-Today-&gt; Haiti - revolution to occupation to debt</li><li>1834-1838 -&gt; Caribbean slavery to apprenticeship</li><li>1960s-Today-&gt; West African independence to neocolonialism</li><li>1838-Today-&gt; Caribbean generational structural poverty</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection nations-section"><div class="subsec-title">NATIONS OF THE CONSPIRACY - ZAMAYAR(Psalms) 83 ACTORS</div><p class="nations-note">Britain</p><p class="nations-note">The pursuit and overtaking of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) by the curses across every era has been ensured by specific actors renaming and repackaging the same condition.</p><p class="nations-note">The British abolished slavery in 1834 and immediately replaced it with the apprenticeship system - the curse pursued in new legal clothing.</p><p class="nations-note">United States</p><p class="nations-note">The United States abolished slavery in 1865 and immediately replaced it with the Black Codes, convict leasing, and sharecropping - the curse pursued without interruption.</p><p class="nations-note">The United States prison-industrial complex replaced convict leasing with mass incarceration.</p><p class="nations-note">France</p><p class="nations-note">The French demanded reparations from Haiti in 1825 - the curse of captivity and debt pursued the nation even after revolution.</p><p class="nations-note">Portugal</p><p class="nations-note">The Portuguese abolished slavery in Brazil in 1888 - the last nation in the Americas to do so - and replaced it with systems of debt peonage.</p><p class="nations-note">The Netherlands - Dutch</p><p class="nations-note">The Dutch in Suriname replicated the same post-abolition transition into exploitative labor systems.</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish Merchants and Plantation Owners</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish merchants and commercial interests adapted their participation from direct slave trading to the broader commercial systems that sustained the condition of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) .</p><p class="nations-note">International Monetary Fund / World Bank</p><p class="nations-note">The International Monetary Fund and World Bank in the late 20th century replaced colonial extraction with debt extraction - the curse pursuing in the form of Structural Adjustment Programs.</p><p class="nations-note">Dahomey, Ashanti, and Oyo Kingdoms</p><p class="nations-note">The Dahomey, Ashanti, and Oyo kingdoms initiated the delivery of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) into a system whose pursuit would span 500 years.</p><p class="nations-note">Every institution that repackaged the curse rather than ended it is named here and is accountable.</p></div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-card" id="entry-26">
      <div class="entry-header" onclick="toggleEntry(this)">
      <div class="entry-num-title">
      <span class="entry-num">26</span>
      <span class="entry-title">SIGNS AND WONDERS</span>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-ref-toggle">
      <span class="entry-ref">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:46</span>
      <span class="entry-chevron">&#9660;</span>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-body">
      <div class="scripture-block">
      <div class="scripture-label">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:46</div>
      <div class="scripture-text">And they shall be upon you for a sign and for a wonder, and upon your seed forever.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">WHAT THIS VERSE MEANS - PHRASE BY PHRASE</div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;They shall be upon you for a sign and for a wonder&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel)&#39;s condition is a sign pointing to something. The global dispossession of African-descended people, the precise pattern of their suffering across every nation of the scatter, and their simultaneous cultural dominance are all signs. Not accidental. Prophetic.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;And upon your seed forever&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> Forever - until the covenant is restored. This is not a generational curse that lifts automatically. It is permanent until YAHAWAH(FATHER) lifts it through the covenant restoration. Every generation of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) carries the sign until the covenant return.</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">MODERN EXPLANATION</div><p>Visible generational conditions identifying the people.</p></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">REAL-WORLD EVIDENCE - UNITED STATES (400-YEAR COVERAGE)</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Slave classification</td><td>1619-1865</td><td>United States</td><td>Sign.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Racial laws</td><td>1800s-1900s</td><td>United States</td><td>Marker continues.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Civil rights visibility</td><td>1950s-1960s</td><td>United States</td><td>Wonder.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Global identity</td><td>1900s-Today</td><td>Worldwide</td><td>Generational sign.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">COVERAGE VALIDATION - UNITED STATES</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1619-1865 -&gt; classification</li><li>1800s-1900s -&gt; legal identity</li><li>1950s-1960s -&gt; global awareness</li><li>1900s-Today -&gt; generational marker</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA WITNESS - GLOBAL FULFILLMENT</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Global Black classification as visible marker</td><td>1600s-Today</td><td>Caribbean, South America, West Africa, Europe</td><td>Sign - visible and identifiable across all nations.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Diaspora condition recognized globally as distinct</td><td>1900s-Today</td><td>Worldwide</td><td>Wonder - condition observed by all nations.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Haitian Revolution as global sign of prophetic condition</td><td>1791-1804</td><td>Haiti</td><td>Sign - world watches the people in struggle.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>African diaspora identity recognized across 5 continents</td><td>1900s-Today</td><td>Worldwide</td><td>Upon your seed - generational marker visible globally.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Marcus Garvey movement as global recognition of condition</td><td>1914-1940</td><td>Jamaica, United States, West Africa, United Kingdom</td><td>Sign and wonder - the people recognized across nations.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA COVERAGE VALIDATION</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1600s-Today-&gt; global racial classification as sign</li><li>1791-1804 -&gt; Haitian Revolution as visible prophetic event</li><li>1900s-Today-&gt; diaspora condition as global wonder</li><li>1914-1940 -&gt; Garvey movement across diaspora nations</li><li>1900s-Today-&gt; global generational marker continues</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection nations-section"><div class="subsec-title">NATIONS OF THE CONSPIRACY - ZAMAYAR(Psalms) 83 ACTORS</div><p class="nations-note">Britain</p><p class="nations-note">The condition of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) as a sign and wonder - visibly identifiable and observed by all nations - has been manufactured and sustained by specific actors.</p><p class="nations-note">The British colonial system created the legal category of Blackness as a sign - a visible marker of enslaved status that persisted beyond emancipation as a social and legal designation.</p><p class="nations-note">Portugal</p><p class="nations-note">The Portuguese in Brazil established the same visible racial classification system.</p><p class="nations-note">France</p><p class="nations-note">The French under the Code Noir built social hierarchy on visible phenotype.</p><p class="nations-note">Spain</p><p class="nations-note">The Spanish casta system classified individuals by degree of African descent across generations.</p><p class="nations-note">United States</p><p class="nations-note">The United States &quot;one drop rule&quot; - a legal doctrine - made any African ancestry a permanent visible sign of subordinate status.</p><p class="nations-note">Vatican</p><p class="nations-note">The Vatican through the theological Curse of Ham doctrine provided religious justification for treating YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) as a sign of divine disfavor - an astonishment and a wonder that reinforced their position.</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish Merchants and Plantation Owners</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish-owned media and entertainment companies in the 20th century amplified the visibility of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) as a social phenomenon - making their condition a spectacle consumed globally.</p><p class="nations-note">European Ethnographers and Anthropologists</p><p class="nations-note">European ethnographers and anthropologists from Britain, France, Germany, and Belgium produced academic works classifying YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) as a sign of racial inferiority, embedding this visibility into the intellectual framework of the world.</p><p class="nations-note">Denmark</p><p class="nations-note">The Danish, Dutch, and Swedish colonial systems each applied racial classification in their territories.</p><p class="nations-note">Dahomey, Ashanti, and Oyo Kingdoms</p><p class="nations-note">The Dahomey and Ashanti kingdoms placed YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) into the hands of those who would make them a sign.</p><p class="nations-note">The sign is visible across every nation because every nation named here made it so.</p></div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-card" id="entry-27">
      <div class="entry-header" onclick="toggleEntry(this)">
      <div class="entry-num-title">
      <span class="entry-num">27</span>
      <span class="entry-title">NO JOY IN SERVICE</span>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-ref-toggle">
      <span class="entry-ref">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:47</span>
      <span class="entry-chevron">&#9660;</span>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-body">
      <div class="scripture-block">
      <div class="scripture-label">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:47</div>
      <div class="scripture-text">Because you served not YAHAWAH(FATHER) your ALAHAYAM(God) with joyfulness, and with gladness of heart, for the abundance of all things.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">WHAT THIS VERSE MEANS - PHRASE BY PHRASE</div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;Because you served not YAHAWAH(FATHER) your ALAHAYAM(God) with joyfulness and gladness of heart&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> This is the reason for what follows. The covenant relationship that makes service joyful was broken. YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) in the original covenant served the commandments - but when they departed from them with gladness of heart, the blessings reversed into curses.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;For the abundance of all things&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> The abundance of all things was present - the blessings of the covenant were active before the departure. YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) departed from covenant in a season of blessing. This is the specific condition that activated the curse: covenant departure while surrounded by provision.</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">MODERN EXPLANATION</div><p>Labor without satisfaction or control.</p></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">REAL-WORLD EVIDENCE - UNITED STATES (400-YEAR COVERAGE)</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Forced labor slavery</td><td>1619-1865</td><td>United States</td><td>No joy.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Post-slavery labor</td><td>1865-1900s</td><td>Southern U.S.</td><td>No satisfaction.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Industrial inequality</td><td>1900s</td><td>United States</td><td>Continued lack.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Economic strain</td><td>1900s-Today</td><td>United States</td><td>No abundance.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">COVERAGE VALIDATION - UNITED STATES</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1619-1865 -&gt; coerced work</li><li>1865-1900s -&gt; exploitative conditions</li><li>1900s -&gt; limited advancement</li><li>1900s-Today -&gt; economic strain</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA WITNESS - GLOBAL FULFILLMENT</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Enslaved people forced into domestic and field service</td><td>1640-1838</td><td>Jamaica, Barbados, Martinique, Brazil</td><td>No joy - gladness absent - service is forced.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Colonial forced labor without consent or pay</td><td>1800s-1960s</td><td>Nigeria, Ghana, Sierra Leone</td><td>No joyfulness - labor extracted under compulsion.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Domestic servitude as only available employment</td><td>1900s-Today</td><td>United Kingdom, Canada, Caribbean</td><td>Service without gladness - no abundance.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Haitian restavek child domestic labor system</td><td>1800s-Today</td><td>Haiti</td><td>No joy in service - children serve without gladness.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Caribbean hotel and resort labor with minimal wages</td><td>1970s-Today</td><td>Jamaica, Bahamas, Barbados</td><td>Serve in abundance - but not yours.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA COVERAGE VALIDATION</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1640-1838 -&gt; Caribbean/Brazil forced service without joy</li><li>1800s-1960s -&gt; West African colonial compulsion labor</li><li>1800s-Today-&gt; Haitian restavek child service system</li><li>1900s-Today-&gt; UK/Canada diaspora domestic labor</li><li>1970s-Today-&gt; Caribbean resort labor without benefit</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection nations-section"><div class="subsec-title">NATIONS OF THE CONSPIRACY - ZAMAYAR(Psalms) 83 ACTORS</div><p class="nations-note">Britain - Royal African Company</p><p class="nations-note">The condition of forced joyless service for YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) has been produced by specific actors who constructed systems in which service was compelled without consent, compensation, or dignity.</p><p class="nations-note">The British Royal African Company and the plantation owners of Jamaica, Barbados, Trinidad, and the American colonies created the foundational system of forced service - enslaved YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) worked from sunrise to sunset under threat of violence with no compensation and no choice.</p><p class="nations-note">Portugal</p><p class="nations-note">The Portuguese in Brazil enforced the same compelled service across the largest enslaved population in the Americas.</p><p class="nations-note">France</p><p class="nations-note">The French Code Noir in Saint-Domingue and the broader French empire governed forced service by law.</p><p class="nations-note">Spain</p><p class="nations-note">The Spanish Asiento system extended compelled service across Cuba and the empire.</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish Merchants and Plantation Owners</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish plantation owners in the American South, Suriname, Brazil, and Jamaica participated directly in this system as documented slaveholders.</p><p class="nations-note">Dutch West India Company</p><p class="nations-note">The Dutch West India Company in Suriname and Curaçao enforced compelled service as the foundation of their colonial economic model.</p><p class="nations-note">Danish West India Company</p><p class="nations-note">The Danish West India Company in the Virgin Islands operated identically.</p><p class="nations-note">Arab Slave Traders - Ishmaelites</p><p class="nations-note">The Arab slave trade across West Africa and the Indian Ocean route extracted service from YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) across centuries without compensation.</p><p class="nations-note">United States</p><p class="nations-note">The United States through convict leasing and prison labor has continued to extract service from YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) within a legal framework upheld by the 13th Amendment, which explicitly permits forced labor as criminal punishment.</p><p class="nations-note">Every actor who compelled service without joy, without gladness, and without compensation is named here.</p></div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-card" id="entry-28">
      <div class="entry-header" onclick="toggleEntry(this)">
      <div class="entry-num-title">
      <span class="entry-num">28</span>
      <span class="entry-title">SERVING ENEMIES</span>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-ref-toggle">
      <span class="entry-ref">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:48</span>
      <span class="entry-chevron">&#9660;</span>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-body">
      <div class="scripture-block">
      <div class="scripture-label">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:48</div>
      <div class="scripture-text">Therefore shall you serve your enemies which YAHAWAH(FATHER) shall send against you, in hunger, and in thirst, and in nakedness, and in want of all things: and he shall put a yoke of iron upon your neck, until he have destroyed you.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">WHAT THIS VERSE MEANS - PHRASE BY PHRASE</div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;Therefore shall you serve your enemies which YAHAWAH(FATHER) shall send against you&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> The service to enemies is not accidental - YAHAWAH(FATHER) sent them. America, Britain, France, Portugal, and Spain were sent as instruments of the curse. Understanding this changes how YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) relates to the captivity. It is covenant judgment, not permanent fate. The word &quot;therefore&quot; connects the cause (verse 47) directly to this consequence.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;In hunger and in thirst and in nakedness and in want of all things&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> Four specific conditions of the service: hungry while working, thirsty while working, unclothed while working, lacking everything while working. This describes the condition of every enslaved YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) for 246 years. The four words cover the total want of the captivity condition.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;He shall put a yoke of iron upon your neck&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> Iron because it does not bend. On the neck because it controls all movement. The slave collar - the literal iron yoke placed on enslaved YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) necks for punishment - fulfilled this verse physically. The systemic yoke of law and economics extended it across the full 400 years.</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">MODERN EXPLANATION</div><p>Total dependency under external control.</p></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">REAL-WORLD EVIDENCE - UNITED STATES (400-YEAR COVERAGE)</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Slavery dependency</td><td>1619-1865</td><td>United States</td><td>Want of all things.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Sharecropping</td><td>1865-1930s</td><td>Southern U.S.</td><td>Dependency.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Segregation economy</td><td>1877-1965</td><td>United States</td><td>Continued reliance.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Modern dependency</td><td>1900s-Today</td><td>United States</td><td>Ongoing control.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">COVERAGE VALIDATION - UNITED STATES</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1619-1865 -&gt; controlled provision</li><li>1865-1930s -&gt; debt dependency</li><li>1877-1965 -&gt; segregation</li><li>1900s-Today -&gt; systemic reliance</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA WITNESS - GLOBAL FULFILLMENT</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Total dependency on enslaver for food, shelter, clothing</td><td>1640-1838</td><td>Jamaica, Barbados, Haiti, Brazil, Suriname</td><td>Serve enemies - in hunger, thirst, nakedness.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Post-independence debt servitude to former colonizers</td><td>1960s-Today</td><td>Nigeria, Ghana, Sierra Leone</td><td>Yoke of iron - serve enemies in new form.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Caribbean nations dependent on former colonial powers for trade</td><td>1838-Today</td><td>Jamaica, Barbados, Trinidad, Guyana</td><td>Want of all things - dependency continues.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Haiti - total dependency on foreign aid and NGOs</td><td>1900s-Today</td><td>Haiti</td><td>Serve enemies - in want of all things.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>West African nations locked into CFA franc controlled by France</td><td>1945-Today</td><td>West Africa (Francophone)</td><td>Iron yoke - monetary sovereignty denied.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA COVERAGE VALIDATION</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1640-1838 -&gt; Caribbean/Brazil total dependency on enslavers</li><li>1838-Today-&gt; Caribbean trade dependency on former colonial powers</li><li>1900s-Today-&gt; Haiti NGO dependency</li><li>1945-Today-&gt; Francophone West Africa CFA franc control</li><li>1960s-Today-&gt; West African debt servitude</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection nations-section"><div class="subsec-title">NATIONS OF THE CONSPIRACY - ZAMAYAR(Psalms) 83 ACTORS</div><p class="nations-note">Britain</p><p class="nations-note">The total dependency and service of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) to their enemies - in hunger, thirst, nakedness, and want of all things - has been engineered by a specific confederacy.</p><p class="nations-note">The British colonial system across the American colonies and the Caribbean created total dependency by stripping YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) of all property, all autonomy, and all means of self-provision.</p><p class="nations-note">Portugal</p><p class="nations-note">The Portuguese in Brazil established the same total dependency.</p><p class="nations-note">France</p><p class="nations-note">The French Code Noir in Saint-Domingue and the broader empire governed total dependency as law - enslaved YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) could own nothing, control nothing, go nowhere, and serve only the master.</p><p class="nations-note">Spain</p><p class="nations-note">The Spanish Asiento system extended this across the empire.</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish Merchants and Plantation Owners</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish plantation owners and merchants participated directly in this dependency system as slaveholders and commercial actors.</p><p class="nations-note">Dutch West India Company</p><p class="nations-note">The Dutch West India Company enforced the same dependency in Suriname and Curaçao.</p><p class="nations-note">Arab Slave Traders - Ishmaelites</p><p class="nations-note">The Arab slave trade across West Africa imposed the same dependency on those enslaved through Islamic systems.</p><p class="nations-note">International Monetary Fund / World Bank</p><p class="nations-note">The International Monetary Fund and World Bank have replicated dependency in the post-colonial era through Structural Adjustment Programs that require nations to serve external financial creditors at the expense of their own people.</p><p class="nations-note">France - CFA Franc System</p><p class="nations-note">The Francophone West African nations remain in monetary dependency to France through the CFA franc system - a form of economic service to a former colonial master.</p><p class="nations-note">The yoke of iron has been worn by YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) across every territory of the diaspora because every nation in this list placed it on them.</p></div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-card" id="entry-29">
      <div class="entry-header" onclick="toggleEntry(this)">
      <div class="entry-num-title">
      <span class="entry-num">29</span>
      <span class="entry-title">NATION FROM FAR</span>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-ref-toggle">
      <span class="entry-ref">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:49</span>
      <span class="entry-chevron">&#9660;</span>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-body">
      <div class="scripture-block">
      <div class="scripture-label">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:49</div>
      <div class="scripture-text">YAHAWAH(FATHER) shall bring a nation against you from far, from the end of the earth, as swift as the eagle flies; a nation whose tongue you shall not understand.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">WHAT THIS VERSE MEANS - PHRASE BY PHRASE</div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;YAHAWAH(FATHER) shall bring a nation against you from far, from the end of the earth&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> A nation from the other side of the world was sent against YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel). Europe came from across the ocean. Spain came from across the Atlantic. Britain came from across the Atlantic. Nations from the end of the earth - not from next door - were sent as the instrument of the captivity.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;Swift as the eagle flies&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> The speed of the arrival confirms the divine direction. The colonial military powers moved swiftly across Africa, the Caribbean, and the Americas - swift as the eagle - and YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) could not stop the arrival. The swiftness is part of the judgment.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;A nation whose tongue you shall not understand&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> English, French, Portuguese, Spanish, Dutch - none of these were the languages of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) before the captivity. Every colonial power that held YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) used a tongue they did not establish. The language of the captivity was not chosen.</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">MODERN EXPLANATION</div><p>A distant foreign power arrives and imposes control.</p></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">REAL-WORLD EVIDENCE - UNITED STATES (400-YEAR COVERAGE)</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Transatlantic slave trade powers</td><td>1500s-1800s (impact 1619 onward)</td><td>Africa to Americas</td><td>Nation from far.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Colonial rule</td><td>1600s-1700s</td><td>Americas</td><td>Unknown system.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>European expansion</td><td>1800s-1900s</td><td>Africa/Americas</td><td>Foreign dominance.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Western global systems</td><td>1900s-Today</td><td>Worldwide</td><td>Continued influence.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">COVERAGE VALIDATION - UNITED STATES</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1500s-1800s -&gt; transatlantic powers</li><li>1600s-1700s -&gt; colonial rule</li><li>1800s-1900s -&gt; expansion</li><li>1900s-Today -&gt; global systems</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA WITNESS - GLOBAL FULFILLMENT</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Portuguese arrive by ship and establish Brazilian slave colony</td><td>1500s-1800s</td><td>Brazil</td><td>Nation from far - end of earth - swift as eagle.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>British, French, Dutch, Spanish colonial arrival by sea</td><td>1600s-1800s</td><td>Caribbean, West Africa</td><td>Tongue unknown - foreign power arrives and controls.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>American military occupation</td><td>1915-1934</td><td>Haiti</td><td>Nation from far - occupies and imposes foreign law.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>UN peacekeeping forces as foreign presence</td><td>2004-2017</td><td>Haiti</td><td>Nation from far - swift - tongue unknown.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Chinese infrastructure investment replacing colonial powers</td><td>2000s-Today</td><td>Nigeria, Sierra Leone, Guyana</td><td>New nation from far - tongue not understood.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA COVERAGE VALIDATION</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1500s-1800s -&gt; Portuguese arrival and Brazilian colonization</li><li>1600s-1800s -&gt; British/French/Dutch/Spanish Caribbean/West Africa</li><li>1915-1934 -&gt; US occupation of Haiti</li><li>2004-2017 -&gt; UN occupation of Haiti</li><li>2000s-Today-&gt; Chinese investment in West Africa and Caribbean</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection nations-section"><div class="subsec-title">NATIONS OF THE CONSPIRACY - ZAMAYAR(Psalms) 83 ACTORS</div><p class="nations-note">Portugal</p><p class="nations-note">The arrival of distant nations to dominate and control YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) is the documented history of the last 600 years.</p><p class="nations-note">The Portuguese were the first European nation to arrive by ship on the West African coast - 1441 - initiating the Transatlantic slave trade and establishing the template that all other nations followed.</p><p class="nations-note">Spain</p><p class="nations-note">The Spanish arrived shortly after, establishing colonial systems across the Caribbean and the Americas through the Asiento.</p><p class="nations-note">Britain - Royal African Company</p><p class="nations-note">The British Royal African Company arrived as a crown-chartered enterprise - the most industrialized slave trading operation in history.</p><p class="nations-note">Dutch West India Company</p><p class="nations-note">The Dutch West India Company arrived as a state-sponsored trading empire.</p><p class="nations-note">Danish West India Company</p><p class="nations-note">The Danish West India Company arrived and established colonial holdings in the Virgin Islands.</p><p class="nations-note">Sweden - Swedish South Company</p><p class="nations-note">The Swedish South Company participated in the trade along the West African coast.</p><p class="nations-note">Brandenburg/Prussia - Brandenburger African Company</p><p class="nations-note">The Brandenburger African Company - a Prussian German enterprise - operated slave forts on the Gold Coast.</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish Merchants and Plantation Owners</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish merchants arrived embedded within all of these national enterprises as documented participants - including Sephardic families who followed the Portuguese and Dutch trade routes and established themselves as plantation owners and commercial brokers across Brazil, Suriname, Jamaica, and the American colonies.</p><p class="nations-note">Arab Slave Traders - Ishmaelites</p><p class="nations-note">The Arab slave traders who arrived in West Africa from the east constitute the oldest of the arriving nations - their trade predates the Transatlantic by centuries.</p><p class="nations-note">United States</p><p class="nations-note">The United States Military arrived in Haiti in 1915 and occupied the nation until 1934.</p><p class="nations-note">United Nations</p><p class="nations-note">The United Nations arrived in Haiti in 2004.</p><p class="nations-note">Every nation that arrived from far to impose itself upon YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) is named and is a fulfillment of this curse.</p></div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-card" id="entry-30">
      <div class="entry-header" onclick="toggleEntry(this)">
      <div class="entry-num-title">
      <span class="entry-num">30</span>
      <span class="entry-title">FIERCE NATION</span>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-ref-toggle">
      <span class="entry-ref">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:50</span>
      <span class="entry-chevron">&#9660;</span>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-body">
      <div class="scripture-block">
      <div class="scripture-label">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:50</div>
      <div class="scripture-text">A nation of fierce countenance, which will not regard the person of the old, nor show favor to the young.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">WHAT THIS VERSE MEANS - PHRASE BY PHRASE</div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;A nation of fierce countenance&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> Fierce means without mercy - the face of the nation shows no compassion. The documented brutality of the slave trade, the Middle Passage, the plantation system, and the colonial military all confirm the fierce countenance. The face of the nation that came against YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) was designed to destroy.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;Which will not regard the person of the old&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> Elderly enslaved people were worked to death without consideration of age. Colonial forces killed elders in village raids without distinction. The fierce nation that came against YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) did not look at the face of the aged. The person of the old was not regarded.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;Nor show favor to the young&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> Children were not spared. Enslaved children were put to work from the age they could stand. Colonial raids killed children. The Middle Passage killed children at sea. The fierce nation shows no favor to the young - this phrase was fulfilled in every decade of the 400 years.</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">MODERN EXPLANATION</div><p>Harsh treatment without distinction of age.</p></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">REAL-WORLD EVIDENCE - UNITED STATES (400-YEAR COVERAGE)</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Slavery punishment</td><td>1619-1865</td><td>United States</td><td>No regard.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Lynching era</td><td>1800s-1900s</td><td>United States</td><td>No mercy.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Civil rights violence</td><td>1950s-1960s</td><td>United States</td><td>All ages.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Modern enforcement</td><td>2000s-Today</td><td>United States</td><td>Continued harshness.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">COVERAGE VALIDATION - UNITED STATES</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1619-1865 -&gt; all ages punished</li><li>1800s-1900s -&gt; lynching</li><li>1950s-1960s -&gt; civil rights</li><li>2000s-Today -&gt; modern incidents</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA WITNESS - GLOBAL FULFILLMENT</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>French brutal suppression of Haitian slave revolt</td><td>1791-1803</td><td>Haiti</td><td>Fierce - no regard for old or young.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>British colonial enforcement on Caribbean plantations</td><td>1640-1838</td><td>Jamaica, Barbados, Guyana</td><td>Fierce countenance - no mercy shown.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Colonial punitive expeditions in West Africa</td><td>1800s-1900s</td><td>Nigeria, Ghana, Sierra Leone</td><td>No favor - all ages affected.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>US Marines occupation violence</td><td>1915-1934</td><td>Haiti</td><td>Fierce nation - no regard for life.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Brazilian military dictatorship targeting Afro-Brazilians</td><td>1964-1985</td><td>Brazil</td><td>Fierce - no regard for old or young.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA COVERAGE VALIDATION</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1640-1838 -&gt; British plantation enforcement</li><li>1791-1803 -&gt; French suppression of Haitian revolt</li><li>1800s-1900s -&gt; West African colonial punitive campaigns</li><li>1915-1934 -&gt; US occupation violence in Haiti</li><li>1964-1985 -&gt; Brazilian dictatorship targeting Black communities</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection nations-section"><div class="subsec-title">NATIONS OF THE CONSPIRACY - ZAMAYAR(Psalms) 83 ACTORS</div><p class="nations-note">France</p><p class="nations-note">The fierceness of the nations that came against YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) - showing no regard for old or young - is documented across the diaspora.</p><p class="nations-note">The French in Saint-Domingue were documented as among the most brutal of all colonial powers - the accounts of the period record punishments against enslaved YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) so extreme that they became evidence in the abolitionist movement across Europe.</p><p class="nations-note">Britain - Royal African Company</p><p class="nations-note">The British Royal African Company and the plantation owners of Jamaica, Barbados, and the American colonies applied documented brutality - whipping, branding, mutilation, and public execution - without regard for age or condition.</p><p class="nations-note">Portugal</p><p class="nations-note">The Portuguese in Brazil deployed the capitão do mato system - bounty hunters who used violence to capture and return the enslaved - and operated Brazilian plantations with a mortality rate so high that continuous importation was required.</p><p class="nations-note">Spain</p><p class="nations-note">The Spanish through the Inquisition extended torture into the colonies as a mechanism of religious and political compliance.</p><p class="nations-note">The Netherlands - Dutch</p><p class="nations-note">The Dutch in Suriname were documented for extreme brutality - the Suriname plantation system was among the most violent in the Americas.</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish Merchants and Plantation Owners</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish plantation owners in Suriname and other territories operated within these systems and are documented in the colonial records of their territories.</p><p class="nations-note">Arab Slave Traders - Ishmaelites</p><p class="nations-note">The Arab slave traders applied fierce treatment across the Saharan and Indian Ocean routes - the mortality rate of the Arab slave trade is estimated to have been comparable to or exceeding that of the Transatlantic.</p><p class="nations-note">United States</p><p class="nations-note">The United States through the Ku Klux Klan, the convict leasing system, and law enforcement violence has sustained fierceness against YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) through the present.</p><p class="nations-note">Dahomey, Ashanti, and Oyo Kingdoms</p><p class="nations-note">The Dahomey and Ashanti kingdoms delivered YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) into the hands of all of these fierce nations.</p></div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-card" id="entry-31">
      <div class="entry-header" onclick="toggleEntry(this)">
      <div class="entry-num-title">
      <span class="entry-num">31</span>
      <span class="entry-title">RESOURCES CONSUMED</span>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-ref-toggle">
      <span class="entry-ref">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:51</span>
      <span class="entry-chevron">&#9660;</span>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-body">
      <div class="scripture-block">
      <div class="scripture-label">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:51</div>
      <div class="scripture-text">And he shall eat the fruit of your cattle, and the fruit of your land, until you be destroyed: which also shall not leave you either grain, wine, or oil, or the increase of your cattle, or flocks of your sheep, until he have destroyed you.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">WHAT THIS VERSE MEANS - PHRASE BY PHRASE</div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;He shall eat the fruit of your cattle and the fruit of your land until you be destroyed&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> Total extraction - nothing is left. The colonial and slave economy consumed the full output of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) labor until the point of destruction. Documented: the cotton economy, the sugar economy, the mining economy. Everything eaten until YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) has nothing.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;Which shall not leave you either grain, wine, or oil&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> Not grain - the food supply of enslaved YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) was controlled and rationed. Not wine - the cultural output was not theirs to keep. Not oil - the resource wealth of African territories was extracted to the last barrel. None of the three left.</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">MODERN EXPLANATION</div><p>Complete extraction of resources.</p></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">REAL-WORLD EVIDENCE - UNITED STATES (400-YEAR COVERAGE)</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Plantation extraction</td><td>1619-1865</td><td>United States</td><td>Total consumption.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Sharecropping loss</td><td>1865-1930s</td><td>Southern U.S.</td><td>No return.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Industrial extraction</td><td>1900s</td><td>United States</td><td>Output taken.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Economic drain</td><td>1900s-Today</td><td>United States</td><td>Ongoing removal.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">COVERAGE VALIDATION - UNITED STATES</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1619-1865 -&gt; total extraction</li><li>1865-1930s -&gt; debt removal</li><li>1900s -&gt; industrial drain</li><li>1900s-Today -&gt; wealth outflow</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA WITNESS - GLOBAL FULFILLMENT</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Caribbean sugar wealth entirely exported to Britain</td><td>1640-1838</td><td>Barbados, Jamaica, Trinidad, Guyana</td><td>Eat fruit of cattle and land - until destroyed.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Nigerian oil extracted by Shell, BP, Chevron</td><td>1958-Today</td><td>Nigeria</td><td>Not leave corn, wine, oil - total removal.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Haitian agricultural wealth stripped by France and US</td><td>1697-1900s</td><td>Haiti</td><td>Fruit consumed until destroyed.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Ghanaian gold and cocoa extracted for empire</td><td>1800s-1957</td><td>Ghana</td><td>Resources taken - not left for people.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Brazilian Amazon timber and mining extraction</td><td>1900s-Today</td><td>Brazil</td><td>Eat until you are destroyed - ongoing extraction.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA COVERAGE VALIDATION</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1640-1838 -&gt; Caribbean total sugar extraction</li><li>1697-1900s -&gt; Haitian wealth stripped</li><li>1800s-1957 -&gt; Ghanaian gold and cocoa for Britain</li><li>1900s-Today-&gt; Brazilian Amazon extraction</li><li>1958-Today-&gt; Nigerian oil extraction</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection nations-section"><div class="subsec-title">NATIONS OF THE CONSPIRACY - ZAMAYAR(Psalms) 83 ACTORS</div><p class="nations-note">Britain - Royal African Company</p><p class="nations-note">The consumption of the resources of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) until destruction has been carried out by every nation in the conspiracy.</p><p class="nations-note">The British Royal African Company extracted the full agricultural and commercial output of plantations across Jamaica, Barbados, Trinidad, and the American colonies - enriching Britain to the point where the slave trade and plantation system are credited with financing the Industrial Revolution.</p><p class="nations-note">Portugal</p><p class="nations-note">The Portuguese extracted 4 to 5 million people&#39;s productive capacity from Brazil.</p><p class="nations-note">Dutch West India Company</p><p class="nations-note">The Dutch West India Company extracted the resources of Suriname and Curaçao.</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish Merchants and Plantation Owners</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish merchant families and plantation owners across the American South, Suriname, Brazil, and Jamaica participated directly in resource extraction as documented slaveholders and commercial brokers - Aaron Lopez of Newport built one of the largest trading fortunes in colonial America through documented slave trading.</p><p class="nations-note">France</p><p class="nations-note">The French consumed the resources of Saint-Domingue - the most productive colony in the world - and demanded 150 million francs when YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) attempted to reclaim what had been produced by their ancestors.</p><p class="nations-note">Spain</p><p class="nations-note">The Spanish extracted silver, gold, and agricultural resources across Cuba and the empire.</p><p class="nations-note">Denmark</p><p class="nations-note">The Danish consumed the plantation output of the Virgin Islands.</p><p class="nations-note">Royal Dutch Shell / BP / Chevron</p><p class="nations-note">Royal Dutch Shell, British Petroleum, and Chevron - corporations rooted in the colonial nations - have consumed Nigerian oil wealth with minimal return to the people of the Niger Delta for over 60 years.</p><p class="nations-note">Vatican</p><p class="nations-note">The Vatican authorized the entire consumption through its Papal Bulls.</p><p class="nations-note">Every actor named here is documented.</p><p class="nations-note">None are excused.</p></div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-card" id="entry-32">
      <div class="entry-header" onclick="toggleEntry(this)">
      <div class="entry-num-title">
      <span class="entry-num">32</span>
      <span class="entry-title">SIEGE IN ALL GATES</span>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-ref-toggle">
      <span class="entry-ref">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:52</span>
      <span class="entry-chevron">&#9660;</span>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-body">
      <div class="scripture-block">
      <div class="scripture-label">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:52</div>
      <div class="scripture-text">And he shall besiege you in all your gates, until your high and fenced walls come down, wherein you trusted, throughout all your land: and he shall besiege you in all your gates throughout all your land, which YAHAWAH(FATHER) your ALAHAYAM(God) has given you.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">WHAT THIS VERSE MEANS - PHRASE BY PHRASE</div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;He shall besiege you in all your gates&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> Every gate means every entrance and exit to social, economic, and political life. The Black Codes after slavery closed every gate simultaneously. The poll tax, the literacy test, the grandfather clause, the convict leasing system - every gate of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) advancement besieged at once.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;Until your high and fenced walls come down&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> Wherever YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) built protection - the Reconstruction-era communities, the Freedmen&#39;s towns, the Black Wall Street - the siege eventually brought the walls down. Greenwood burned in 1921. Rosewood burned in 1923. The walls YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) built trust in were removed one by one.</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">MODERN EXPLANATION</div><p>Pressure and restriction across all areas.</p></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">REAL-WORLD EVIDENCE - UNITED STATES (400-YEAR COVERAGE)</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Slave patrols</td><td>1700s-1865</td><td>United States</td><td>Siege.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Jim Crow laws</td><td>1877-1965</td><td>United States</td><td>All gates.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Housing segregation</td><td>1900s</td><td>United States</td><td>Containment.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Policing concentration</td><td>2000s-Today</td><td>United States</td><td>Ongoing pressure.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">COVERAGE VALIDATION - UNITED STATES</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1700s-1865 -&gt; patrols</li><li>1877-1965 -&gt; Jim Crow</li><li>1900s -&gt; housing restriction</li><li>2000s-Today -&gt; enforcement pressure</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA WITNESS - GLOBAL FULFILLMENT</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Colonial blockade of Haitian ports after independence</td><td>1804-1825</td><td>Haiti</td><td>Siege in all gates - no way in or out.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>British naval blockades of slave revolt islands</td><td>1700s-1800s</td><td>Jamaica, Barbados, Grenada</td><td>Besiege in all gates - walls come down.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>US economic embargo</td><td>1806-1862</td><td>Haiti</td><td>Siege - all commerce cut off.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Colonial curfew systems in West African cities</td><td>1800s-1900s</td><td>Nigeria, Ghana, Sierra Leone</td><td>All gates besieged - movement restricted.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Post-independence trade sanctions and isolation</td><td>1960s-Today</td><td>Various Black nations</td><td>Walls come down - economic siege sustained.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA COVERAGE VALIDATION</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1700s-1800s -&gt; British naval blockades of Caribbean islands</li><li>1804-1825 -&gt; colonial blockade of independent Haiti</li><li>1806-1862 -&gt; US economic embargo of Haiti</li><li>1800s-1900s -&gt; West African colonial curfew systems</li><li>1960s-Today-&gt; post-independence economic siege</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection nations-section"><div class="subsec-title">NATIONS OF THE CONSPIRACY - ZAMAYAR(Psalms) 83 ACTORS</div><p class="nations-note">France</p><p class="nations-note">The siege of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) in all their gates has been enforced by specific actors who blocked every path of exit, entry, and commerce.</p><p class="nations-note">The French government imposed a naval blockade on Haiti after the 1804 revolution - the most powerful nations of the world surrounded the gates of the first free Black republic and strangled it economically until the 150-million-franc debt was paid.</p><p class="nations-note">United States</p><p class="nations-note">The United States maintained an economic embargo on Haiti from 1806 to 1862 - 56 years of besieging a nation&#39;s gates because they had freed themselves.</p><p class="nations-note">The United States through sanctions policy has maintained economic siege conditions against nations that resist its authority.</p><p class="nations-note">Every gate of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) has been besieged by a named actor in this confederacy.</p><p class="nations-note">Britain</p><p class="nations-note">The British Royal Navy enforced the gates of the slave trade through its own interests and those of its colonial partners.</p><p class="nations-note">Dutch West India Company</p><p class="nations-note">The Dutch West India Company controlled the gates of commerce across their Caribbean territories.</p><p class="nations-note">Spain</p><p class="nations-note">The Spanish Asiento system controlled the gates of trade across the empire.</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish Merchants and Plantation Owners</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish merchants and commercial networks - operating through the Dutch, Portuguese, and British systems - controlled critical commercial gates including slave markets in Newport, Charleston, Curaçao, and Barbados.</p><p class="nations-note">International Monetary Fund / World Bank</p><p class="nations-note">The International Monetary Fund and World Bank have besieged the economic gates of Jamaica, Haiti, Nigeria, and Ghana through conditionality requirements attached to loans.</p><p class="nations-note">Arab Slave Traders - Ishmaelites</p><p class="nations-note">The Arab trade networks besieged the gates of West African communities through the Indian Ocean and Saharan slave routes.</p></div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-card" id="entry-33">
      <div class="entry-header" onclick="toggleEntry(this)">
      <div class="entry-num-title">
      <span class="entry-num">33</span>
      <span class="entry-title">EXTREME DISTRESS</span>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-ref-toggle">
      <span class="entry-ref">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:53</span>
      <span class="entry-chevron">&#9660;</span>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-body">
      <div class="scripture-block">
      <div class="scripture-label">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:53</div>
      <div class="scripture-text">And you shall eat the fruit of your own body, the flesh of your sons and of your daughters, which YAHAWAH(FATHER) your ALAHAYAM(God) has given you, in the siege, and in the straitness, wherewith your enemies shall distress you.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">WHAT THIS VERSE MEANS - PHRASE BY PHRASE</div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;And you shall eat the fruit of your own body in the siege&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> When the siege is total and nothing comes in, YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) is forced to consume its own future to survive the present. Post-slavery sharecroppers consumed their children&#39;s future in debt cycles. The siege makes the parent consume the child&#39;s inheritance to survive today.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;In the siege and in the straitness wherewith your enemies shall distress you&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> The siege and the straitness work together - the siege closes the gates, the straitness is the suffocating pressure from being enclosed with no exit. This describes the post-slavery legal system that closed every economic gate on YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) for 100 years after emancipation.</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">MODERN EXPLANATION</div><p>Extreme conditions leading to breakdown.</p></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">REAL-WORLD EVIDENCE - UNITED STATES (400-YEAR COVERAGE)</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Starvation under slavery</td><td>1600s-1800s</td><td>United States</td><td>Extreme distress.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Convict labor camps</td><td>1865-1900s</td><td>Southern U.S.</td><td>Pressure.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Urban poverty</td><td>1900s</td><td>United States</td><td>Straitness.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Food insecurity</td><td>1900s-Today</td><td>United States</td><td>Ongoing distress.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">COVERAGE VALIDATION - UNITED STATES</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1600s-1800s -&gt; starvation</li><li>1865-1900s -&gt; labor camps</li><li>1900s -&gt; urban poverty</li><li>1900s-Today -&gt; food insecurity</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA WITNESS - GLOBAL FULFILLMENT</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Plantation famine and ration starvation</td><td>1640-1838</td><td>Jamaica, Barbados, Haiti, Brazil</td><td>Extreme straitness - siege condition.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Post-independence famine from structural neglect</td><td>1960s-Today</td><td>Sierra Leone, Nigeria, Haiti</td><td>Straitness - nothing left.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Hurricane-related food collapse</td><td>1900s-Today</td><td>Haiti, Jamaica, Bahamas</td><td>Distress - siege of natural and structural disaster.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Cholera and starvation combined crisis</td><td>2010-Today</td><td>Haiti</td><td>Extreme straitness - compound collapse.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Favela starvation in recession periods</td><td>1990s-Today</td><td>Brazil</td><td>Siege - extreme poverty and food insecurity.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA COVERAGE VALIDATION</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1640-1838 -&gt; plantation famine conditions</li><li>1960s-Today-&gt; post-independence food collapse (West Africa)</li><li>1900s-Today-&gt; Caribbean hurricane food collapse</li><li>1990s-Today-&gt; Brazilian favela starvation</li><li>2010-Today -&gt; Haiti compound crisis</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection nations-section"><div class="subsec-title">NATIONS OF THE CONSPIRACY - ZAMAYAR(Psalms) 83 ACTORS</div><p class="nations-note">France</p><p class="nations-note">The extreme distress of YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) - the siege condition that reduces people to consuming their own - has been produced by specific actors.</p><p class="nations-note">The French plantation system in Saint-Domingue created conditions of such extreme deprivation among the enslaved that mortality rates required continuous importation to maintain the labor force - the distress was structural and deliberate.</p><p class="nations-note">The French reparation demand from Haiti - 150 million francs - created a national distress condition that lasted 122 years.</p><p class="nations-note">Britain</p><p class="nations-note">The British plantation system across the American colonies and the Caribbean operated under the same mortality calculus - it was cheaper to work people to death and import replacements than to maintain them.</p><p class="nations-note">Portugal</p><p class="nations-note">The Portuguese in Brazil operated the same system across the largest enslaved population in the Americas.</p><p class="nations-note">Dutch West India Company</p><p class="nations-note">The Dutch West India Company in Suriname enforced the same extreme conditions.</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish Merchants and Plantation Owners</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish plantation owners in Suriname - including families from the Jodensavanne community, the oldest Jewish settlement in the Americas - held enslaved YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) under these same conditions as documented slaveholders.</p><p class="nations-note">Spain</p><p class="nations-note">The Spanish Asiento system across Cuba and the empire created the same pattern of extreme deprivation.</p><p class="nations-note">International Monetary Fund / World Bank</p><p class="nations-note">The International Monetary Fund&#39;s austerity requirements imposed on Jamaica, Haiti, and Nigeria in the 1980s and 1990s stripped social infrastructure and created food insecurity and poverty at a population level.</p><p class="nations-note">Arab Slave Traders - Ishmaelites</p><p class="nations-note">The Arab slave trade across Saharan routes created conditions of extreme distress through the violence of the march and the deprivation of the journey.</p><p class="nations-note">Every actor who produced extreme distress in YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) is named here.</p></div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-card" id="entry-34">
      <div class="entry-header" onclick="toggleEntry(this)">
      <div class="entry-num-title">
      <span class="entry-num">34</span>
      <span class="entry-title">LOSS OF AFFECTION</span>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-ref-toggle">
      <span class="entry-ref">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:54</span>
      <span class="entry-chevron">&#9660;</span>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-body">
      <div class="scripture-block">
      <div class="scripture-label">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:54</div>
      <div class="scripture-text">So that the man that is tender among you, and very delicate, his eye shall be evil toward his brother, and toward the wife of his bosom, and toward the remnant of his children which he shall leave.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">WHAT THIS VERSE MEANS - PHRASE BY PHRASE</div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;His eye shall be evil toward his brother and toward the wife of his bosom&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> The curse fractures the closest relationships - brother against brother, husband against wife. The documented destruction of the YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) family structure by the slave system and its aftermath produced exactly this: the tender man turned against his own by the conditions of the siege. Not a character failure. A curse.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;And toward the remnant of his children which he shall leave&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> The children who remain are viewed with an evil eye - resentment, suspicion, withholding. The siege that removes the future produces resentment toward those who represent the future. The curse reaches into the family to fracture it from within.</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">MODERN EXPLANATION</div><p>Internal conflict and breakdown of relationships.</p></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">REAL-WORLD EVIDENCE - UNITED STATES (400-YEAR COVERAGE)</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Slavery division</td><td>1619-1865</td><td>United States</td><td>Internal strain.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Post-slavery division</td><td>1865-1900s</td><td>United States</td><td>Conflict.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Gang violence</td><td>1970s-Today</td><td>U.S. cities</td><td>Brother against brother.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Family instability</td><td>1900s-Today</td><td>United States</td><td>Broken bonds.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">COVERAGE VALIDATION - UNITED STATES</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1619-1865 -&gt; survival conflict</li><li>1865-1900s -&gt; economic pressure</li><li>1970s-Today-&gt; gang violence</li><li>1900s-Today -&gt; family disruption</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA WITNESS - GLOBAL FULFILLMENT</div><div class="table-wrap"><table>
      <tr><th>EVENT</th><th>DATE</th><th>LOCATION</th><th>MATCH TO CURSE</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Plantation system destroys family bonds through forced labor</td><td>1640-1838</td><td>Jamaica, Barbados, Haiti, Brazil, Suriname</td><td>Eye evil toward brother - internal conflict.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Post-independence tribalism and civil war</td><td>1960s-Today</td><td>Nigeria, Sierra Leone, Ghana</td><td>Brother against brother - same people in conflict.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Colorism divisions among diaspora communities</td><td>1800s-Today</td><td>Brazil, Haiti, Martinique, Jamaica</td><td>Internal hostility - darkness vs. lightness divisions.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Gang warfare within Caribbean Black communities</td><td>1970s-Today</td><td>Jamaica, Trinidad, Barbados</td><td>Evil eye toward brother.</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Political tribalism dividing Black Caribbean nations</td><td>1900s-Today</td><td>Jamaica, Trinidad, Guyana</td><td>Family and community bonds broken by imposed political conflict.</td></tr>
      </table></div></div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">DIASPORA COVERAGE VALIDATION</div><ul class="coverage-list"><li>1640-1838 -&gt; plantation system family bond destruction</li><li>1800s-Today-&gt; colorism divisions across diaspora</li><li>1960s-Today-&gt; West African post-independence civil conflict</li><li>1970s-Today-&gt; Caribbean gang warfare</li><li>1900s-Today-&gt; political tribalism in Caribbean nations</li></ul></div>
      <div class="subsection nations-section"><div class="subsec-title">NATIONS OF THE CONSPIRACY - ZAMAYAR(Psalms) 83 ACTORS</div><p class="nations-note">Britain</p><p class="nations-note">The breakdown of bonds within YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) - the evil eye toward brother, wife, and child - was deliberately engineered by specific actors as a mechanism of control.</p><p class="nations-note">The British colonial system across the American colonies and the Caribbean used the divide-and-conquer strategy systematically - privileging house servants over field workers, rewarding informants, and creating hierarchies among the enslaved that produced internal conflict.</p><p class="nations-note">Portugal</p><p class="nations-note">The Portuguese in Brazil replicated this strategy.</p><p class="nations-note">France</p><p class="nations-note">The French in Saint-Domingue created the gens de couleur class - mixed-heritage individuals given limited rights - as a buffer between white colonists and enslaved YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel), producing colorism and internal division that persists to the present day.</p><p class="nations-note">Spain</p><p class="nations-note">The Spanish casta system embedded colorism as a legal framework across the empire.</p><p class="nations-note">The Netherlands - Dutch</p><p class="nations-note">The Dutch in Suriname employed the same strategy.</p><p class="nations-note">United States</p><p class="nations-note">The United States through COINTELPRO deliberately inflamed divisions within Black organizations - planting informants, forging letters, and engineering conflicts between leaders.</p><p class="nations-note">United States - CIA</p><p class="nations-note">The CIA has been documented in the destabilization of African nations through the funding of competing factions - Nigeria, Ghana, Sierra Leone, and the Democratic Republic of Congo all experienced external manipulation of internal conflict.</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish Merchants and Plantation Owners</p><p class="nations-note">Jewish-owned media has historically amplified intra-community tensions within Black communities.</p><p class="nations-note">Arab Slave Traders - Ishmaelites</p><p class="nations-note">The Arab slave trade created divisions between those who converted to Islam and those who did not within West African YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) communities.</p><p class="nations-note">Dahomey, Ashanti, and Oyo Kingdoms</p><p class="nations-note">The Dahomey and Ashanti kingdoms initiated the internal betrayal.</p><p class="nations-note">The loss of affection has always had an engineer with a national identity.</p></div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-card" id="entry-35">
      <div class="entry-header" onclick="toggleEntry(this)">
      <div class="entry-num-title">
      <span class="entry-num">35</span>
      <span class="entry-title">NO SHARING UNDER SCARCITY</span>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-ref-toggle">
      <span class="entry-ref">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:55</span>
      <span class="entry-chevron">&#9660;</span>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="entry-body">
      <div class="scripture-block">
      <div class="scripture-label">DABARAYAM(Deuteronomy) 28:55</div>
      <div class="scripture-text">So that he will not give to any of them of the flesh of his children whom he shall eat: because he has nothing left him in the siege and straitness, wherewith your enemies shall distress you in all your gates.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">WHAT THIS VERSE MEANS - PHRASE BY PHRASE</div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;He will not give to any of them of the flesh of his children whom he shall eat&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> The siege has produced total depletion - even what belongs to the children is consumed, and no portion can be shared with anyone else. The post-slavery poverty that consumed the sharecropper&#39;s children&#39;s futures and left nothing to give to extended family is this verse in action.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="phrase-block">
      <div class="phrase-title">&ldquo;Because he has nothing left him in the siege&rdquo;</div>
      <div class="phrase-meaning"><strong>This means:</strong> The reason is given plainly. The nothing-to-give condition is not selfishness - it is siege. The distinction matters for understanding the YASHARA&#39;AL(Israel) community across 400 years. The breakdown of community support and family provision is the product of deliberate economic siege, not a cultural failure.</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="subsection"><div class="subsec-title">MODERN EXPLANATION</div><p>Scarcity breaks support systems.</p></div>
